# cryptofoundry

> Self-hosted crypto software, bots, payments and infrastructure — built by engineers behind a real blockchain ecosystem since 2016.

## Who we are

cryptofoundry builds and maintains self-hosted crypto automation and infrastructure for teams that need control, security, and real engineering.

We build crypto software and maintain it in production.

Built by engineers who operate the ADAMANT blockchain, messenger, and wallet ecosystem since 2016.

We do not promise trading profits or take custody of client funds.

## Services

- Crypto Bots & Automation: https://adamant.business/bots-and-automation
- Crypto Payments & Licensing: https://adamant.business/crypto-payments
- Trading Software: https://adamant.business/trading-software
- Wallets, Nodes & Infrastructure: https://adamant.business/infra
- Security, Review & Hardening: https://adamant.business/security-audits
- ADAMANT-powered Private Communication: https://adamant.business/blockchain
